heading: Azure (Microsoft Azure) Data Transfer Costs
body:
Data transfer costs for Atlas deployments running on Azure (Microsoft Azure).

| Data Transfer Type                           | Price per GB     |
| -------------------------------------------- | ---------------- |
| Data Transfer                                | $0.087 to $0.181 |
| VNET Data Transfer (Same Region)             | $0.01            |
| Global VNET Peering Data Transfer            | $0.035 to $0.16  |
| Inter Region Intra-continental Data Transfer | $0.02 to $0.16   |
| Inter Region Inter-continental Data Transfer | $0.02 to $0.16   |

Atlas charges for data transfer between your Atlas node
and another node. The following transfers incur costs, listed in order
of lowest cost to highest:

- Data transfer in the same AWS (Amazon Web Services) region.

- Data transfer between different AWS (Amazon Web Services) regions.

- Data transfer to a location outside of an AWS (Amazon Web Services) region,
  excluding incoming transfers to the Atlas node.
